heading: Vercel Native Integration
body:
To integrate with Vercel, locate MongoDB Atlas in the Vercel Marketplace
and create a new MongoDB Atlas account with billing conducted through Vercel.
A Native Integration of MongoDB Atlas in Vercel allows you to:

- Provision Atlas resources directly from the Vercel dashboard and
  manage billing through your Vercel account. You can also directly
  access resources in Atlas through a provisioned linked account.

- Deploy MongoDB Atlas clusters for new and existing Vercel applications.

After you create MongoDB Atlas clusters, Vercel adds your Atlas
cluster credentials and other settings to your Vercel environments.

Atlas provisions the account for you if you don't have one.
The Atlas account is linked to the Vercel installation.
You have separate credentials for logging into Atlas.
